title: rubus acutifrons
intro: Rubus acutifrons, also known as the Japanese thimbleberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the rose family. It is native to Japan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus acutifrons include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, among others. The herbal preparations of Rubus acutifrons include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
